note: GCTU has active postgraduate partnerships with Anhalt University of Applied Sciences (Germany) and MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences (India) for Masters and PhD programmes.
Anhalt University programmes are delivered through GCTU's Distance Learning Systems (online, blended, and sandwiched modes) — accessible from all regions of Ghana.

MS Ramaiah University PhD programmes are research-based; students attend initial coursework at GCTU Accra campus, liaise with supervisors remotely, and travel to Bangalore, India for the final viva voce.
Fees for international partnership programmes are set by the partner institution — contact GCTU SGSR (gs.gctu.edu.gh) for current rates.
Application forms available at apply.gctu.edu.gh; submit certified documents to GCTU SGSR, Tesano, Accra.
